hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know about booking, pricing, collections and payments.

items.q: How do I book a service?
items.a: Use our online booking journey — select your service, answer a few quick questions, choose a date and pay securely with Stripe. The whole process takes under three minutes.

items.q: Is the price I see the price I pay?
items.a: Yes. We show transparent, upfront pricing with any applicable charges before you pay. There are no hidden fees.

items.q: Can I get a custom quote?
items.a: Absolutely. For larger or specialist jobs, contact us and our team will provide a tailored, no-obligation quote.
Same-day and next-day availability is offered in most areas. Enter your postcode on the Areas We Cover page to check.

items.q: Do I need a permit for a skip?
items.a: If your skip is placed on a public road you'll need a permit. We arrange this for you during booking where required.

items.q: What can't go in a skip?
items.a: Hazardous materials such as asbestos, chemicals, batteries and electrical items can't go in a standard skip — but we offer dedicated hazardous waste collection for these.
Payments are handled securely by Stripe Checkout. We accept credit and debit cards, Apple Pay and Google Pay.
Yes. A confirmation email and invoice are sent automatically once your payment is successful.
Completely. We never store your card details — all payments are processed directly and securely through Stripe.
We divert 98% of collected waste away from landfill. Materials are sorted and recycled at licensed facilities wherever possible.

items.q: Are you a licensed waste carrier?
items.a: Yes. We are registered with the Environment Agency and provide full waste transfer documentation for every collection.
